# agents

This repository exposes the [`agents` module](https://github.com/carla-simulator/carla/tree/1ef3f55c9555de401681cb26ce87f81718943624/PythonAPI/carla/agents), which is shipped separately from the [`carla` python package](https://pypi.org/project/carla/) with the [simulator distribution](https://github.com/carla-simulator/carla), as a python package. The python code for the module itself is taken from the respective version of the simulator distributable and unmodified.

Currently supported CARLA versions:

- v0.9.15
